zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri I de Navarre Roi de Navarre於1244年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布特洛也斯時，他的父親Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre43歲，母親Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre33歲。他於1269年與Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre在法國瑟-吉馬內默倫結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1274年7月22日在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納享年30歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利盧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henri I de Navarre Roi de Navarre于1244年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布特洛也斯时，他的父亲Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre43岁，母亲Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre33岁。他于1269年与Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre在法国瑟-吉馬內默倫结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1274年7月22日在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納享年30岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利盧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Navarre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Jacques, Anatole, Angelle, Camille, Marcelle.
French: habitational name from Navarre (see   Navarra  ).

variants.name: Navarra
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Edgardo, Guido, Santo, Vito, Angelo, Annamarie, Antonio, Benedicto, Camillo, Dante, Emilio, Fausto, Gaetano, Giuseppe, Mario, Romulo, Sergio.  Spanish Agustin, Herlinda, Manuel, Solita.

Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name from Navarre (Castilian Navarra, Basque Nafarroa, French Navarre), a largely Basque-speaking region now divided between Spain and France, but in the Middle Ages an independent Basque kingdom. The name of the region derives from Basque naba ‘plain next to mountains’. Compare Navarre .

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri I de Navarre Roi de Navarre was born in 1244, in Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre, was 43 and his mother, Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre, was 33. He married Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre in 1269, in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 22 July 1274, in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spain, at the age of 30, and was buried in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri I de Navarre Roi de Navarre est né en 1244, à Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre en 1269, à Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 juillet 1274, à Iruña, Nafarroa, Espagne, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri I de Navarre Roi de Navarre 1244 in Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre 43 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre 33. Er hat 1269 in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. Juli 1274 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spanien und wurde in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henri I de Navarre Roi de Navarre è nato il nel 1244 nel Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre nel 1269, nel Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 22 luglio 1274, nel Iruña, Nafarroa, Spagna, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Henri I de Navarre Roi de Navarreが1244年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベトロイスで生まれた時，父Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarreは43歳，母Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarreは33歳であった。1269年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメルンでBlanche d’Artois Reine de Navarreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1274年7月22日にスペインナファロアイルnアで30歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henri I de Navarre Roi de Navarre(이)가 1244년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 트로예스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1269년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 멜루에서 Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1274년 7월 22일 스페인 나파로 이루n아에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henri I de Navarre Roi de Navarre nasceu em 1244, em Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre em 1269, em Melun, Seine-et-Marne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de julho de 1274, em Iruña, Nafarroa, Espanha, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri I de Navarre Roi de Navarre родился в 1244 г. в местности троиесь, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre в 1269 г. в местности мелун, сине-ет-марн, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 22 июля 1274 г. в местности ируnа, нафарроа, Испания в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности роуен, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.

sm.Between 1270 and 1274: mai le 1270 e o'o I le 1274

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henri I de Navarre Roi de Navarre nació en 1244, en Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre en 1269, en Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 22 de julio de 1274, en Pamplona, Navarra, España, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.
